description: 574 §22.F — the AmbientDeclaration catalog (Move 2, self-covering). The tree-wide ambient facets that live ONLY in the host-owned adopted sheet (primitives/ambientStyles.ts, delivered by the JfElement base — Move 1). `check-ambient-purity` PROJECTS its ban-list from `classB` (shadow-scoped pseudos/keyframes with zero legitimate in-component site) AND asserts POSITIVE coverage — each `classB` facet must be DEFINED in the authority. Adding a facet here auto-bans its re-authoring in any component AND requires the sheet to provide it: coverage-projects-from-catalog (557 §5.2), the discovery step is adding the row. `utilities` (additive opt-in classes) and `keyframes` are documented for completeness; they are NOT banned (a component may compose a utility class).
